# CWE-378 vulnerable: Creation of Temporary File With Insecure Permissions (positive, pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-378-vulnerable.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"
	"os"
	"path/filepath"
)

func SaveUploadBuffer(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) error {
	job := r.URL.Query().Get("job")
	chunk := r.FormValue("chunk")
	if job == "" || chunk == "" {
		http.Error(w, "job and chunk required", http.StatusBadRequest)
		return http.ErrMissingFile
	}
	tmp := filepath.Join(os.TempDir(), "upload-"+job+".bin")
	err := os.WriteFile(tmp, []byte(chunk), 0666)
	if err != nil {
		http.Error(w, err.Error(), http.StatusInternalServerError)
		return err
	}
	w.WriteHeader(http.StatusOK)
	return nil
}
